form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.1 lengths second at Wanganui Straight but did record a sharp 17.35 over the 313m journey. Heading the right way looks well placed to score.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wanganui Straight (17.22) in a Class 2/3, finishing a 1.3 lengths fourth. Has never missed the frame from three starts from the draw, including a win. Tough field and appears tested.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 1.2 lengths in a Class 1 at Manawatu and recording a dominant 25.77 over the 457m journey. Has claims with the right run.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Wanganui Straight over 313m in 17.76. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 457m at Manawatu at Class 1 level. Include on best form.

form.formComment: Placed last time (39.07) at Manawatu in a Class 2/3, finishing third and beaten 8 lengths. Has three wins and four placings from 14 starts from the draw. Better last time but not convinced this is her race.
